name: Major Holdings Limited
summary: Major Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the sale and distribution of premium wine and spirits in Hong Kong. It offers red wine, white wine, sparkling wine, sake, wine accessory products, and other products. The company is also involved in trading of wine, as well as provides wine storage and consignment services. It offers products through its retail shops; and through a network of distributors, retail organizations, five-star hotels, and private clubs. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
